compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and workflow docs to remove eval references and document deterministic testing
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Documentation-only update to CLAUDE.md and workflow docs. Remove all promptfoo eval references and add entries for contract tests and referential integrity linting.

## Context
After stories 23f2-3fed (promptfoo removal) and b9c8-43f2 (deterministic replacements), CLAUDE.md still describes the old eval infrastructure. This task makes the docs accurate.

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md: Remove skill eval Quick Reference entries, Architecture eval section, Never-Do rules about evals. Add entries for check-contract-schemas and check-referential-integrity.
- Search for any workflow docs in plugins/dso/docs/workflows/ that reference eval infrastructure and update them.
- Check llms.txt for SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md reference (line ~24) and remove it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given CLAUDE.md, When I grep for 'eval\|promptfoo\|SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE\|run-skill-evals\|generate-skill-eval', Then no matches remain
- Given CLAUDE.md, When I read the Architecture section, Then check-contract-schemas and check-referential-integrity are documented
- Given any workflow docs, When I grep for eval references, Then no stale references remain
- Given llms.txt, When I grep for SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md, Then no match remains

## Testing Mode: UPDATE (docs-only; no new logic, no tests required)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done - removed eval/promptfoo references (none found), added check-contract-schemas.sh and check-referential-integrity.sh to CLAUDE.md Architecture section and llms.txt Plugin Source section
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: CLAUDE.md, llms.txt. Eval references verified absent.
comments.author: Test
